hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] STOP: $input" >> /tmp/claude-pet-hook.log; printf '%s' "$input" | curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:47625/claude-code/stop -H 'content-type: application/json' --max-time 5 -d @- > /dev/null || true

input=$(cat); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] NOTIF: $input" >> /tmp/claude-pet-hook.log; printf '%s' "$input" | curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:47625/claude-code/notification -H 'content-type: application/json' --max-time 5 -d @- > /dev/null || true

input=$(cat); echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] PERM: $input" >> /tmp/claude-pet-hook.log; printf '%s' "$input" | curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:47625/claude-code/permission-request -H 'content-type: application/json' --max-time 5 -d @- > /dev/null || true
